# View cases

You can view your support cases on the **Cases** page, including cases that are **processing**, **querying**, or **completed**.

### View your cases

To view your cases:

1. Go to **Helpdesk** > **Cases**.
2. Review the list of all cases.

The list includes key information such as the case ID, reporter, assignee, creation date, and current status.&#x20;

### Open case details

There are two ways to view detailed information for a case, including messages, parameters, attachments, and more.&#x20;

You can do this from the **Helpdesk** > **Cases** page, or directly from the **Chats** page.

#### From the Cases page

To open case details from the **Cases** page:

1. Go to **Helpdesk** > **Cases**.
2. (Optional) Use the <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="<svg xmlns=&#x22;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#x22; height=&#x22;24px&#x22; viewBox=&#x22;0 -960 960 960&#x22; width=&#x22;24px&#x22; fill=&#x22;#5f6368&#x22;><path d=&#x22;M400-240v-80h160v80H400ZM240-440v-80h480v80H240ZM120-640v-80h720v80H120Z&#x22;/></svg>" data-size="line">**Filter** option to locate the desired case.&#x20;
3. Select the case ID to open the case details.

#### From the Chats page

To open case details from the **Chats** page:

1. Go to **Chats**.
2. (Optional) Use the <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="<svg xmlns=&#x22;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#x22; height=&#x22;24px&#x22; viewBox=&#x22;0 -960 960 960&#x22; width=&#x22;24px&#x22; fill=&#x22;#5f6368&#x22;><path d=&#x22;M400-240v-80h160v80H400ZM240-440v-80h480v80H240ZM120-640v-80h720v80H120Z&#x22;/></svg>" data-size="line">**Filter** option in the chat list to filter support cases.&#x20;
3. Select a case to open the case details.
